basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) Research Associate-I Walk-in Notification 2026 has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IISER Pune Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation commensurate with educational qualification(s) and/or experience(s) of the applicant may be considered for candidates having qualification and experience higher than the advertised with the prior approval of the competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Experimental Condensed Matter Physics
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Experimental Condensed Matter Physics. Preference for experience in Synthesis and Characterization of Carbon Nanotubes, Magnetic Oxides and Nano-Scale device fabrication.

salary_details.details: Rs. 57,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance Per Month

all_official_links.label: Download IISER Pune Research Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IISER Pune recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IISER Pune recruitment is Research Associate-I.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate-I post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in recruitment, so candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date. The walk-in date is 25-06-2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the required qualification for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The required qualification is a Ph.D. in Experimental Condensed Matter Physics.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate-I post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The offered salary is Rs. 57,000/- per month plus 30% House Rent Allowance.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attend a walk-in interview with all required documents on the specified date and venue.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for IISER Pune recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune), Pune, Maharashtra, 411008.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.
